_comment: Lean MCP set. Add via CodePilot's MCP page. Replace <...> placeholders. Never commit real tokens. Port 8888 for SearXNG is deliberate: 8080 is Open WebUI / Jenkins / Tomcat default and SearXNG silently returns HTML (not JSON) when it cannot bind, which breaks mcp-searxng with a misleading 'Invalid JSON format' error. Use 8888 unless you know 8080 is free. See GUIDE.md step 11 and healthtest.md T08/T21/T22.
